title: Teresina、PI — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Teresina、PIの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TeresinaはPIにある人口871,126の都市です。The only northeastern capital not on the coast, known for its intense heat, riverside setting, and the Parque Nacional da Serra da Capivara nearby.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
